nasb.text: If we have built us an altar to turn away from following the Lord, or if to offer a burnt offering or grain offering on it, or if to offer sacrifices of peace offerings on it, may the Lord Himself require it.

esv.text: for building an altar to turn away from following the Lord. Or if we did so to offer burnt offerings or grain offerings or peace offerings on it, may the Lord himself take vengeance.

cnv.text: 我們若是為自己築壇，轉離不跟從耶和華，或是把燔祭、素祭和平安祭獻在壇上，願耶和華親自追究我們。

ccb.text: 如果我们离弃耶和华，为自己造祭坛，或是在坛上献燔祭、素祭和平安祭，愿耶和华亲自惩罚我们。
